army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy, 0-2 Traits

If a Trait is taken, all models / units in the army must be upgraded with it, unless stated otherwise.

archetypes.name: Krumpa Kompany
archetypes.description:
- The army only has access to the following units, regardless of other traits:
- Boss, Mek, Painboy
- Nobs
- Battlewagons, Deff Dreads
- Nobs can be taken as Troops.
- All models for which this is possible must be equipped with Mega armor.
- All units gain the "Objective secured!" ability.

archetypes.name: Speedfreaks
archetypes.description:
- Stormboyz and Warbikers can be taken as Troops.
- All units with less than 12" Movement must start the game as passengers inside a transport.
- Units that have no transport option and less than 12" Movement cannot be taken at all.

legacies.name: Da ’ardest Boyz
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Goff in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Rich Boyz
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Bad Moons in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Sneaky Gitz
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Blood Axes in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Speedfreaks
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Evil Sunz in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Squig-Luvvas
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Snakebites in the Clan Armory.

legacies.name: Da Lootaz
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Deathskulls in the Clan Armory.

traits.name: 'orrible Gitz
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deflect" ability. Only for Gretchins.

traits.name: Armed To Da Teeth
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(6+)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Big Krumpaz
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 to melee hit rolls until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Big Red Button
traits.description: Vehicle units can roll on the Ramshackle table at any time during their activation, roll 2D6 and pick any result while doing so. Explosions are resolved at Strength 7.

traits.name: Boom Boyz
traits.description: Weapons with the "Barrage" or "Explosive" ability can hit up to one more model per unit.

traits.name: Flyboyz
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deflect" ability. Only for Flyers.

traits.name: Lucky Gitz
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one hit or wound roll per battle round.

traits.name: Mixed Warband
traits.description: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: No messing around here
traits.description: The unit gains the "Rending(6+)" ability for all melee attacks.

traits.name: Pyromaniacs
traits.description: All weapons with the "Flames" ability cause 1 additional hit.

traits.name: Rascals
traits.description: The unit gains the "Sunder(1)" ability for all ranged attacks.

traits.name: Taktiks
traits.description: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: The Old Ways
traits.description: If the unit uses a Charge order or gets charged by an enemy unit, it gains +1 Strength until the end of the current battle round.

traits.name: Waaagh! Coast Kustoms
traits.description: Each Kustom job can be taken one additional time.
